markets.question: Will Silkeborg IF win on 2026-04-05?
markets.description:

markets.question: Spread: AS Saint-Étienne (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Ligue 2 game, scheduled for March 21 at 3:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "AS Saint-Étienne" if AS Saint-Étienne win the game by 2 or more goals.
